data.name: Hentai World Succubus
data.detailed_description:
Hentai World Succubuss is a relaxing puzzle game featuring a variety of attractive girls. Immerse yourself in a charming atmosphere enhanced by soothing music as you solve puzzles. Swap puzzle pieces to advance through levels and unlock extra viewing modes. Enjoy the satisfaction of revealing the full image after each puzzle, with no time limits.

Features:

Attractive girl images & calming music.

Full-view mode available upon completing each level.

Multiple levels with increasing difficulty for extended enjoyment.

data.short_description: This is a relaxing puzzle game featuring sexy girls, set in an inviting atmosphere with calming music. Players swap puzzle pieces to complete levels and unlock extra viewing options. With no time limits, you can enjoy the satisfaction of revealing each full image at your own pace.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows XP, Vista, 7, 8, or 10
  • 處理器: 3.4 GHz Dual Core Processor
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 512MB
